instruction: Service auth-gateway shows TLS handshake errors. After cert-manager renewal. Outline remediation. (case ref #167)
output: Verify chain, ingress annotation for secret, HSTS preload not blocking, clock skew.

instruction: Service checkout-api shows disk full. /var/log at 98% on nodes. Outline remediation. (case ref #246)
output: Log rotation, ship logs to aggregator, drain node if kubelet unstable, increase volume or clean images.

instruction: Service notification-worker shows memory leak. Heap growth 2%/hour; restart clears symptom. Outline remediation. (case ref #120)
output: Enable profiling, capture heap dumps before OOM, fix leak in hot path, add memory limits and liveness probes.

instruction: Cloud spend increased 12% month-over-month in INR. What steps should finance+engineering review? (case ref #83)
output: Segment 12% increase by service and tag. Check for new environments, data transfer spikes, and unattached storage. Compare RI/SP coverage. Produce top three drivers and rough INR impact estimates with assumptions.

instruction: Prometheus scraping fails for some targets after TLS cert renewal.
input: Error: x certificate signed by unknown authority.
output: Align scrape TLS config with new CA bundle or use proper tls_config ca_file. Roll out updated ServiceMonitor/PodMonitor. If mTLS rotated, update client certs on Prometheus or reverse proxy. Validate clock skew on targets.

instruction: Cloud spend increased 22% month-over-month in INR. What steps should finance+engineering review? (case ref #36)
output: Segment 22% increase by service and tag. Check for new environments, data transfer spikes, and unattached storage. Compare RI/SP coverage. Produce top three drivers and rough INR impact estimates with assumptions.

instruction: SLO error budget burn is 5% in 6h for checkout availability. How should paging behave? (case ref #243)
output: Use multi-burn alerts: fast burn pages immediately, slow burn notifies during business hours. Require runbook link. Add cause labels. Freeze non-critical deploys when budget below threshold.

instruction: SLO error budget burn is 0.1% in 5m for checkout availability. How should paging behave? (case ref #273)
output: Use multi-burn alerts: fast burn pages immediately, slow burn notifies during business hours. Require runbook link. Add cause labels. Freeze non-critical deploys when budget below threshold.

instruction: We see repeated 503s from payment-api after the last deploy. Logs show connection reset to Redis. What should we check first? (case ref #190)
input: Region: ap-south-1. Redis cluster mode enabled. Deploy was 45 minutes ago.
output: 1) Verify Redis cluster node health and failover events in ElastiCache/console. 2) Check payment-api connection pool sizing vs Redis maxclients and timeouts. 3) Compare app config for TLS/SNI changes vs previous release. 4) Roll back canary or full deploy if error rate exceeds SLO; capture thread dumps from one payment-api pod.

instruction: Our monthly AWS bill in INR jumped 18%. Give a focused cost review checklist for OptiOps. (case ref #169)
output: Review Cost Explorer by service (EC2, RDS, data transfer). Check idle EBS volumes and orphaned snapshots in ap-south-1. Validate Savings Plans vs On-Demand mix. Inspect NAT Gateway hours and cross-AZ traffic. Tag enforcement for owner/team. Rightsize instances using Compute Optimizer recommendations. Report estimated savings in INR with assumptions.
